# Farid Enrique "Eathan" Jiménez Campo

> AI Engineer, Data Scientist and Full Stack Developer based in Barranquilla, Colombia. He turns data and AI into smart decisions: automation, AI agents, dashboards and software development. Site is bilingual (Spanish at the root, English under /en).

## Site
- Home (Spanish): https://farid.com.co
- Home (English): https://farid.com.co/en
- Blog: https://farid.com.co/blog
- Free AI diagnosis (60s tool): https://farid.com.co/diagnostico
- AI text playground (live demo): https://farid.com.co/playground

## Services
- Artificial Intelligence, LLMs and copilots integrated into real operations
- Data Science and Machine Learning
- Automation and API integration
- Full Stack Development
- AI Agents that reason, use tools and execute tasks
- Smart dashboards that explain data, not just show it

## Projects (in production)
- Xentris Tech — technology company (software, cloud, AI, digital strategy): https://xentris.tech
- Platim.co — industrial safety workwear and PPE (B2B, Colombia): https://platim.co
- Yota Montacargas — forklift sales, rental, parts and service: https://yotamontacargas.com
- Neona.Tech — AI studio (coming soon): https://neona.tech
- DominioGPT — AI tool that generates brand domain names and checks availability in real time: https://dominio.neona.tech
